Title: President And CEO
Company Short Description:
Curran Group is a family owned and operated holding company. We're in the business of building businesses — giving great companies strategic support and the resources to succeed. We partner with our employees, customers, and suppliers as they are an integral part of our business and success. As in family, the foundation of these relationships is driven by respect and integrity.

For more than 100 years and five generations, the family-owned Curran Group has been building great businesses and supporting their success through a culture of integrity, respect, partnership, family, and improvement. With more than 1,000 employees across all of our locations, our diverse portfolio of subsidiaries spans multiple sectors, including asphalt paving and excavation, railway services, and paint-finishing systems.

At Curran Group, our mission is to build businesses, create high-performance teams, and bring value to our employees, communities, partners, and shareholders. We're known for living by our core values, taking care of our employees and customers, and bringing the personal touch to every interaction.

The Curran Group team seeks to carry on our long history & legacy with an eye toward a future where we help our businesses continue to thrive with strategic support and resources, empower our employees with new opportunities for professional development, and expand in the competitive mergers and acquisitions space.

Title: Vice President
Company Short Description:
Private Equity Partner of Choice for Lower Middle-Market Healthcare Services Companies

Vesey Street Capital Partners (VSCP) is a New York City-based private equity firm specializing in buyouts of lower middle-market healthcare services businesses. Established in 2014, VSCP targets founder-led businesses and corporate carve outs with a track record of robust cash flow and minimal reimbursement risk. These companies typically have EBITDA in the range of $10-20 million and the firm utilizes conservative balance sheet leverage. VSCP seeks to create value by growing revenue and EBITDA both organically and via M&A. With a collective experience of more than 100 years in analyzing and investing in healthcare services companies, VSCP's team holds profound industry expertise and strong connections with industry leaders, enabling them to concentrate on identifying opportunities from a proprietary deal flow with focus on founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs.

VSCP invests on behalf of a wide array of Limited Partners, including asset management firms, family offices, pension funds, and other institutional investors. The firm prides itself on having great alignment with all its key stakeholders.

Title: Managing Partner
Company Short Description:
RiverGlade Capital is a private equity firm focused on control buyouts of growth-oriented, lower middle market healthcare companies. Through partnership with founder-owned, high-quality, differentiated businesses, RiverGlade strives to accelerate value, professionalize, and transform organizations into highly attractive strategic assets. Founded in 2017, RiverGlade's Managing Partners have been investing together for more than two decades, and bring the resources, relationships, and validated methodologies to help scale exceptional healthcare companies. 

Investment Focus
RiverGlade partners with founder-owned healthcare businesses that have proven organic growth, multiple levers for value-creation, a culture of compliance and clinical excellence, and a differentiated service offering with a strong market reputation.  Companies typically have more than $3 million in EBITDA and align with RiverGlade's operating resources and expertise. RiverGlade generally looks to invest $20-80 million of equity per platform in transactions with meaningful founder rollover and a prudent leverage structure. 

RiverGlade has consistently utilized a macro theme-driven, top-down approach to identify areas of the healthcare sector that may present actionable opportunities. Currently, RiverGlade is focused on compelling opportunities within 1) multi-unit, 2) outsourced services, 3) tech-enabled solutions, and 4) medical products and distribution models.

Title: CEO
Company Short Description:
Counsel Financial is the premier litigation finance company in the U.S., uniquely serving contingency-fee law firms and the capital providers that invest in them. Founded by attorneys in 2000, we understand the unique challenges faced by law firms operating on a contingency-fee model.

For law firms, we deliver creative capital partnerships that allow firms to transform anticipated contingent fees into powerful assets. Our tailored financing solutions provide the flexibility to grow, invest in operations, and take on complex cases while advocating for their clients without compromise.

For capital providers, we provide proven solutions in origination, underwriting, and loan servicing. Our tech-enabled Capital Provider Portal offers real-time portfolio monitoring and robust risk management, empowering capital providers to confidently invest in the legal industry.

We operate with the belief that opportunities should never be limited by resources. Counsel Financial is dedicated to helping law firms and capital providers succeed and grow together in the evolving world of contingency-fee litigation.

Company Short Description:
Private Equity Partner of Choice for Lower Middle-Market Healthcare Services Companies

Vesey Street Capital Partners (VSCP) is a New York City-based private equity firm specializing in buyouts of lower middle-market healthcare services businesses. Established in 2014, VSCP targets founder-led businesses and corporate carve outs with a track record of robust cash flow and minimal reimbursement risk. These companies typically have EBITDA in the range of $10-20 million and the firm utilizes conservative balance sheet leverage. VSCP seeks to create value by growing revenue and EBITDA both organically and via M&A. With a collective experience of more than 100 years in analyzing and investing in healthcare services companies, VSCP's team holds profound industry expertise and strong connections with industry leaders, enabling them to concentrate on identifying opportunities from a proprietary deal flow with focus on founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs.

VSCP invests on behalf of a wide array of Limited Partners, including asset management firms, family offices, pension funds, and other institutional investors. The firm prides itself on having great alignment with all its key stakeholders.

Title: Managing Partner
Company Short Description:
Private Equity Partner of Choice for Lower Middle-Market Healthcare Services Companies

Vesey Street Capital Partners (VSCP) is a New York City-based private equity firm specializing in buyouts of lower middle-market healthcare services businesses. Established in 2014, VSCP targets founder-led businesses and corporate carve outs with a track record of robust cash flow and minimal reimbursement risk. These companies typically have EBITDA in the range of $10-20 million and the firm utilizes conservative balance sheet leverage. VSCP seeks to create value by growing revenue and EBITDA both organically and via M&A. With a collective experience of more than 100 years in analyzing and investing in healthcare services companies, VSCP's team holds profound industry expertise and strong connections with industry leaders, enabling them to concentrate on identifying opportunities from a proprietary deal flow with focus on founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs.

VSCP invests on behalf of a wide array of Limited Partners, including asset management firms, family offices, pension funds, and other institutional investors. The firm prides itself on having great alignment with all its key stakeholders.

Title: Owner
Company Short Description:
Alpha Management aiuta gli investitori privati ed istituzionali a generare cash flow dai Patrimoni mobiliari.
Il Gestore migliore? Quello che a parità di volatilità genera il cash flow più alto con rischi sistematici e non specifici.

L'essenza fondante di Alpha Management è il risk management, inteso nel senso più ampio e completo del termine. L'efficienza dei portafogli è il miglior antidoto per neutralizzare l'elevata incertezza sui mercati finanziari.

Alpha Management mette a disposizione le sue conoscenze teoriche e le competenze maturate sul campo nei settori del risk management, del portfolio management e della relazione consulenziale continuativa con la clientela istituzionale.

Title: Managing Partner
Company Short Description:
RiverGlade Capital is a private equity firm focused on control buyouts of growth-oriented, lower middle market healthcare companies. Through partnership with founder-owned, high-quality, differentiated businesses, RiverGlade strives to accelerate value, professionalize, and transform organizations into highly attractive strategic assets. Founded in 2017, RiverGlade's Managing Partners have been investing together for more than two decades, and bring the resources, relationships, and validated methodologies to help scale exceptional healthcare companies. 

Investment Focus
RiverGlade partners with founder-owned healthcare businesses that have proven organic growth, multiple levers for value-creation, a culture of compliance and clinical excellence, and a differentiated service offering with a strong market reputation.  Companies typically have more than $3 million in EBITDA and align with RiverGlade's operating resources and expertise. RiverGlade generally looks to invest $20-80 million of equity per platform in transactions with meaningful founder rollover and a prudent leverage structure. 

RiverGlade has consistently utilized a macro theme-driven, top-down approach to identify areas of the healthcare sector that may present actionable opportunities. Currently, RiverGlade is focused on compelling opportunities within 1) multi-unit, 2) outsourced services, 3) tech-enabled solutions, and 4) medical products and distribution models.

Company Short Description:
Private Equity Partner of Choice for Lower Middle-Market Healthcare Services Companies

Vesey Street Capital Partners (VSCP) is a New York City-based private equity firm specializing in buyouts of lower middle-market healthcare services businesses. Established in 2014, VSCP targets founder-led businesses and corporate carve outs with a track record of robust cash flow and minimal reimbursement risk. These companies typically have EBITDA in the range of $10-20 million and the firm utilizes conservative balance sheet leverage. VSCP seeks to create value by growing revenue and EBITDA both organically and via M&A. With a collective experience of more than 100 years in analyzing and investing in healthcare services companies, VSCP's team holds profound industry expertise and strong connections with industry leaders, enabling them to concentrate on identifying opportunities from a proprietary deal flow with focus on founder-led businesses and corporate carve-outs.
